seoTitle: Mount George vs Mount Harris — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount George and Mount Harris. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount George vs Mount Harris: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount George and Mount Harris.
heading: Mount George vs Mount Harris — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount George, New South Wales and Mount Harris, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount George has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Mount Harris (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount George or Mount Harris safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount George has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Mount Harris scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount George scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Harris scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount George or Mount Harris?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount George has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.42% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
